mapper.select: SELECT * FROM admins WHERE username=%s AND password=%s
SELECT * FROM orders WHERE order_date=CURRENT_DATE ORDER BY ordered_at
SELECT TO_CHAR(order_date, 'YYYY-MM') as ym, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders GROUP BY ym ORDER BY ym DESC LIMIT 12
SELECT TO_CHAR(order_date, 'YYYY') as yr, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders GROUP BY yr ORDER BY yr DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(price),0) as total FROM orders WHERE TO_CHAR(order_date, 'YYYY-MM')=%s
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(price),0) as total FROM orders WHERE TO_CHAR(order_date, 'YYYY')=%s
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, COALESCE(SUM(price),0) as total FROM orders
SELECT restaurant_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders GROUP BY restaurant_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT menu_name, restaurant_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders GROUP BY menu_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT orderer_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders GROUP BY orderer_name ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 3
SELECT restaurant_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders GROUP BY restaurant_name ORDER BY total DESC
SELECT restaurant_name, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders WHERE order_date=CURRENT_DATE GROUP BY restaurant_name ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT order_date, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(price) as total FROM orders WHERE order_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY order_date ORDER BY order_date
